seo.title: Xtend Barre Express
seo.description: Get a strong lean physique in only 15 minutes!

trainers.bioBodi: As a Pilates instructor and former professional dancer, Andrea Rogers created Xtend Barre, XB Pilates, and XB Sweat + Sculpt by combining elements of barre and Pilates with high-energy cardio-dance. Her proven programs and techniques have helped thousands of people worldwide transform their bodies and gain strength and confidence.

data.descriptionShort: Get a strong lean physique in only 15 minutes!
data.descriptionLong: Now you can get an Xtend Barre body even if you're short on time. These workouts are efficient, effective and deliver the results you want without going to a barre studio.

modules.equipment: Sturdy Chair or Ballet Barre, Dumbbells (Light)*, Mat*, Resistance Loops*, Squishy Ball*
modules.categories: Barre, Pilates, Strength, Slim & Sculpt, Weight Loss

modules.title: What Are The Xtend Barre Express Workouts Like?
modules.content: Andrea’s Xtend Barre Express workouts blend cardio, Pilates, and ballet fundamentals to help you sculpt a lean, strong physique, now in less time.

modules.title: Are The Xtend Barre Workouts Right For Me?
modules.content: If you're looking to get a strong, lean physique without the bulk and without the impact, look no further. Andrea's created 8 workouts, 15 minutes each all with a different focus to burn fat, sculpt your abs and legs, lift your booty and transform your entire body faster than you ever thought possible.

modules.title: Tools + Equipment
modules.content: No equipment is required, but light dumbbells, resistance loops, and a mat are recommended.

modules.title: Nutrition for a Healthier Body and Mind
modules.content: Beachbody’s nutrition programs have made it easier for millions of people to eat healthier and make simple lifestyle changes that are easy to stick with. Created by Autumn Calabrese, Portion Fix shows you how eating the right portions helps you reach your goals—no counting calories or eliminating your favorite foods required. With 2B Mindset, creator Ilana Muhlstein, MS, RDN, helps you lose weight happily by focusing on what you can eat, instead of what you can’t. You’ll never feel hungry or deprived. Need help choosing the right nutrition program for you? To find the right program for your lifestyle, visit FindMyProgramTool.com.

trainers.bio: As a Pilates instructor and former professional dancer, Andrea Rogers created Xtend Barre, XB Pilates, and XB Sweat + Sculpt by combining elements of barre and Pilates with high-energy cardio-dance. Her proven programs and techniques have helped thousands of people worldwide transform their bodies and gain strength and confidence.

modules.title: Taylor N. lost 8.2 lbs.
modules.testimonial: I loved the variety of excercises. You work your body in so many different ways using limited materials and I never got bored! I loved that I could do it anywhere so I didn’t have any excuses not to get it done!
modules.disclaimer: Results vary based on starting point and effort. Results achieved in 30 days with XTEND BARRE.

NWOt1I2xWP7xm05A7tYnEi.descriptionShort: Define yourself with PiYo. No weights, no jumps, just hardcore results.
NWOt1I2xWP7xm05A7tYnEi.descriptionLong: PiYo combines the muscle-sculpting, core-firming benefits of Pilates with the strength and flexibility benefits of yoga. It's a true fat-burning, low-impact program that'll get you incredibly defined.
